projects.note: Active AI video work continuing: after the client-requested 'Billboard Split' treatment, Diego Triana built corrected billboard scenes for the storyboard (7/10) and Bianca reviewed the billboard inserts 7/13 ('look perfect') with only minor notes on one distorted shot; Leonardo back from PTO 7/13. Real, ongoing execution.

Round-2 feedback has come back in (client design comments from Jess + copy confirmations from Sydney); team is now actively building the final Creative Delivery 3 and final files, with Vinay implementing feedback 7/14. Asana (confirmed match, Ongoing) shows V3 IR due 7/14 and V3 CR + Final Files due 7/15 — an active delivery push, no longer just awaiting feedback.

F1 (Creative Delivery 3 + Google exports) sent to customer 7/9; Asana 'Client Approval Due - F1' was due 7/13 and is now ~1 day overdue with no client reply as of 7/14 — still awaiting approval, short delay only, not stale.
KV Presentation V2 formally sent to customer review 7/7, capping a week of continuous design work (Figma iterations 7/1-7/7); still no client feedback as of 7/14 (~1 week), team awaiting response.

New draft delivered 7/3 after real work 6/29-7/3; customer confirmed 7/7 he's happy with the initial setup and reviewing in detail before debriefing Superside. Watch closely — this project has a history of 2.5-month stalls hidden behind similar vague 'awaiting feedback' notes.

Client feedback fully in; team actively implementing approved edits and exporting — exports for the first 6 carousel categories sent to customer 7/14, and World Cup post Delivery 1 now in production (Asana Ongoing; World Cup CR due 7/15, delivery ~7/16). Active production, no longer just awaiting feedback.

Client approved the final image selection (V6 sent 7/13) and the project moved into post-production/finals; Manuel Ruiz executing edits across two 10-image batches with IR/CR milestones set 7/15-7/17, Bradley pushing for speed. Active daily work.

projects.display_name: Lucid Motors — Book a Demo Paid Ads
projects.note: Final assets sent for customer review 6/18; client cited layoffs 6/23 and went silent. Team still chasing — Angeles posted 7/14 they're 'still waiting for feedback' — but ~4 weeks of client silence with no real progress.

projects.display_name: Lucid Motors — General Awareness Paid Ads
projects.note: Assets sent for customer review 6/19; client cited layoffs 6/23. Team chased 7/6 (Chris) and again 7/14 (Angeles: 'still waiting for feedback') — no client response for ~3.5 weeks, no real progress.

No real work or client contact since D1 was sent 2026-02-20 (~5 months); only activity since is internal PTO/on-hold announcements, most recently Monise's 6/30 OOO note reconfirming the project is paused until mid-late July.

projects.display_name: Strava — Garmin Remind Me Later Retargeting FTUE
projects.note: New Strava retargeting project; channel created 7/13. Project plan shared with the client 7/14 but pending their confirmation — Maria noted there's nothing to execute yet. IR planned Thursday, CR Friday. Matching Asana project exists. No creative work started.
